payload.summary_zh: 当前公开版本包含 Laravel 重构后的后台、多语言基础支持、任务管理优化、主题预览和知识库向量化预览等能力。
payload.summary_en: The current public release includes the Laravel-based admin console, baseline multilingual support, task management improvements, theme preview workflow, and knowledge-base vector preview.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级前请备份数据库、.env、uploads 和 storage 数据，再按更新日志执行部署。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Before upgrading, back up your database, .env, uploads, and storage data, then follow the changelog.
